segments.text: Ahab had seventy sons in Samaria. Jehu wrote letters, and sent to Samaria, unto the rulers of Jezreel, to the elders, and to them that brought up Ahab's children,
Look even out the best and meetest of your master's sons, and set him on his father's throne, and fight for your master's house.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: As soon as this letter cometh to you, seeing your master's sons are with you, and there are with you chariots and horses, a fenced city also, and armour;
Behold, two kings stood not before him: how then shall we stand?
segments.speaker: Rulers of Jezreel

segments.text: We are thy servants, and will do all that thou shalt bid us; we will not make any king: do thou that which is good in thine eyes.
segments.speaker: House Overseer and City Elders

segments.text: If ye be mine, and if ye will hearken unto my voice, take ye the heads of the men your master's sons, and come to me to Jezreel by to morrow this time.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: There came a messenger, and told him,
They have brought the heads of the king's sons.
segments.speaker: Messenger

segments.text: Lay ye them in two heaps at the entering in of the gate until the morning.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Ye be righteous: behold, I conspired against my master, and slew him: but who slew all these?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Know now that there shall fall unto the earth nothing of the word of the LORD, which the LORD spake concerning the house of Ahab: for the LORD hath done that which he spake by his servant Elijah.
segments.speaker: Jehu

footnotes: by: Heb. by the hand of

segments.text: When he was departed thence, he lighted on Jehonadab the son of Rechab coming to meet him:
Is thine heart right, as my heart is with thy heart?
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: It is. If it be, give me thine hand.
segments.speaker: Jehonadab

segments.text: Ahab served Baal a little; but Jehu shall serve him much.
segments.speaker: Jehu

segments.text: Because thou hast done well in executing that which is right in mine eyes, and hast done unto the house of Ahab according to all that was in mine heart, thy children of the fourth generation shall sit on the throne of Israel.
segments.speaker: God
